rain: Rain again. My knees predicted this.
At least it washes the blood off the cobblestones.
The well will overflow. Small mercies.
storm: Stay inside tonight. The forest gets... active in storms.
Lightning hit the old oak by the road. Still standing. Everything in this village is stubborn.
fog: Can't see the forest edge today. That's either a comfort or a warning.
The fog smells green. Like sap. Like the forest is breathing on us.
